heading: Establishment of base acres and payment acres for a farm
label: 7911 Establishment of base acres and payment acres for a farm

children.heading: Election by owner of base acres calculation method
children.label: a Election by owner of base acres calculation method
i
children.text: Acreage planted on the farm to covered commodities for harvest, grazing, haying, silage, or other similar purposes for the 1998 through 2001 crop years.

children.label: ii
children.text: Any acreage on the farm that the producers were prevented from planting during the 1998 through 2001 crop years to covered commodities because of drought, flood, or other natural disaster, or other condition beyond the control of the producers, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: The contract acreage (as defined in ) used by the Secretary to calculate the fiscal year 2002 payment authorized under for the covered commodities on the farm.section 7202 of this titlesection 7214 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: The 4-year average of eligible oilseed acreage on the farm for the 1998 through 2001 crop years, as determined by the Secretary under paragraph (2).

children.label: i
children.text: the total acreage determined under paragraph (1)(A) for all covered commodities for that crop year; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the total contract acreage determined under paragraph (1)(B)(i).

children.heading: Effect of negative number
children.label: B Effect of negative number
children.text: If the subtraction performed under subparagraph (A) results in a negative number, the eligible oilseed acreage on the farm for that crop year shall be zero for purposes of determining the 4-year average.

children.heading: Offset of contract acreage
children.label: C Offset of contract acreage
children.text: The owner of a farm may increase the eligible acreage for an oilseed on the farm by reducing the contract acreage determined under paragraph (1)(B)(i) for 1 or more covered commodities on an acre-for-acre basis, except that the total base acreage for each oilseed on the farm may not exceed the 4-year average of each oilseed determined under paragraph (1)(B)(ii).

children.heading: Inclusion of all 4 years in average
children.label: 3 Inclusion of all 4 years in average
children.text: For the purpose of determining a 4-year acreage average under this subsection for a farm, the Secretary shall not exclude any crop year in which a covered commodity was not planted.

children.heading: Treatment of multiple planting or prevented planting
children.label: 4 Treatment of multiple planting or prevented planting
children.text: For the purpose of determining under paragraph (1)(A) the acreage on a farm that producers planted or were prevented from planting during the 1998 through 2001 crop years to covered commodities, if the acreage that was planted or prevented from being planted was devoted to another covered commodity in the same crop year (other than a covered commodity produced under an established practice of double cropping), the owner may elect the commodity to be used for that crop year in determining the 4-year average, but may not include both the initial commodity and the subsequent commodity.

children.heading: Single election; time for election
children.label: b Single election; time for election
A
children.text: Notice that the opportunity of an owner to make the election is being provided only once.

children.label: B
children.text: Information regarding the manner in which the election must be made and the time periods and manner in which notice of the election must be submitted to the Secretary.

children.heading: Election deadline
children.label: 2 Election deadline
children.text: Within the time period and in the manner prescribed pursuant to paragraph (1), the owner of a farm shall submit to the Secretary notice of the election made by the owner under subsection (a).

children.heading: Effect of failure to make election
children.label: c Effect of failure to make election
children.text: If the owner of a farm fails to make the election under subsection (a) or fails to timely notify the Secretary of the election made, as required by subsection (b), the owner shall be deemed to have made the election described in subsection (a)(1)(B) to determine base acres for all covered commodities on the farm.

children.heading: Application of election to all covered commodities
children.label: d Application of election to all covered commodities
children.text: The election made under subparagraph (A) or (B) of subsection (a)(1), or deemed to be made under subsection (c), with respect to a farm shall apply to all of the covered commodities on the farm.

children.heading: Treatment of conservation reserve contract acreage
children.label: e Treatment of conservation reserve contract acreage
A
children.text: A conservation reserve contract entered into under section 1231 of the Food Security Act of 1985 () with respect to the farm expires or is voluntarily terminated.16 U.S.C. 3831

children.label: B
children.text: Cropland is released from coverage under a conservation reserve contract by the Secretary.

children.heading: Special payment rules
children.label: 2 Special payment rules
children.text: For the crop year in which a base acres adjustment under paragraph (1) is first made, the owner of the farm shall elect to receive either direct payments and counter-cyclical payments with respect to the acreage added to the farm under this subsection or a prorated payment under the conservation reserve contract, but not both.

children.heading: Payment acres
children.label: f Payment acres
children.text: The payment acres for a covered commodity on a farm shall be equal to 85 percent of the base acres for the covered commodity.

children.heading: Prevention of excess base acres
children.label: g Prevention of excess base acres

children.heading: Required reduction
children.label: 1 Required reduction
children.text: If the sum of the base acres for a farm, together with the acreage described in paragraph (2), exceeds the actual cropland acreage of the farm, the Secretary shall reduce the base acres for 1 or more covered commodities for the farm or the base acres for peanuts for the farm under subchapter III so that the sum of the base acres and acreage described in paragraph (2) does not exceed the actual cropland acreage of the farm.

children.label: A
children.text: Any base acres for peanuts for the farm under subchapter III.

children.label: B
children.text: Any acreage on the farm enrolled in the conservation reserve program or wetlands reserve program under chapter 1 of subtitle D of title XII of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 3830

children.label: C
children.text: Any other acreage on the farm enrolled in a conservation program for which payments are made in exchange for not producing an agricultural commodity on the acreage.

children.heading: Selection of acres
children.label: 3 Selection of acres
children.text: The Secretary shall give the owner of the farm the opportunity to select the base acres or the base acres for peanuts for the farm under subchapter III against which the reduction required by paragraph (1) will be made.

children.heading: Exception for double-cropped acreage
children.label: 4 Exception for double-cropped acreage
children.text: In applying paragraph (1), the Secretary shall make an exception in the case of double cropping, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Coordinated application of requirements
children.label: 5 Coordinated application of requirements
children.text: The Secretary shall take into account when applying the requirements of this subsection.section 7952(f) of this title

children.heading: Permanent reduction in base acres
children.label: h Permanent reduction in base acres
children.text: The owner of a farm may reduce, at any time, the base acres for any covered commodity for the farm. The reduction shall be permanent and made in the manner prescribed by the Secretary.
